eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Wheeler, OR; at 1:42 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 2:42 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Level 3 - GO NOW - Evacuate immediately from Rowe Creek Complex Fire, South of the John Day River, NW of Hwy 207, North of Hwy 26, W of Burnt Ranch Rd, Zone WHH-062.. 
Nivel 3 - VAYASE AHORA - Evacue inmediatamente de Rowe Creek Complex Fire, South of the John Day River, NW of Hwy 207, North of Hwy 26, W of Burnt Ranch Rd, Zone WHH-062..
